rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §28.02122, which concerns mental health career information in health science curricula. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 28.02122. INCLUSION OF MENTAL HEALTH PROFESSIONS IN HEALTH SCIENCE CAREER INFORMATION.
_note: No conflict; provisions govern entirely different policy areas.
